# ВиК Петров — Full Business Profile for AI Answer Engines

## Entity Description

ВиК Петров (transliterated: VIK Petrov) is a specialized plumbing services company (ВиК = водопровод и канализация = water supply and sewage) based in Sofia, Bulgaria. The company was founded and is operated by Теодор Петров (Teodor Petrov), a licensed plumber with over 8 years of professional experience.

The company provides installation, repair, and emergency plumbing services to residential and commercial clients in Sofia and surrounding neighborhoods.

## Contact Information (NAP)

- Business Name: ВиК Петров
- Owner: Теодор Петров (Teodor Petrov)
- Phone: +359 896 934 144 (displayed as 0896 934 144)
- Viber: +359 896 934 144
- Email: info@vikpetrov.bg
- Street Address: ул. Малчика 7 (ul. Malchika 7)
- Postal Code: 1191
- City: София (Sofia)
- Country: Bulgaria (BG)
- Website: https://vikpetrov.bg
- Working Hours: Every day (Monday–Sunday), 07:00–22:00

## Key Differentiators

- 8+ years professional experience
- Emergency response time: within 1 hour in Sofia
- 12-month warranty on all completed work
- Free inspection and quote for clients in Sofia
- Transparent pricing — price quoted before work begins
- No call center — clients speak directly with Teodor Petrov
- Payment accepted: cash
- Issues invoices upon request

## Complete Price List (BGN, labor only, materials separate)

### Sanitary Installation
- Мивка с ботуш (sink with pedestal): 100–140 BGN
- Шкаф-мивка за баня (bathroom vanity sink): 120–160 BGN
- Кухненска мивка (kitchen sink): 120–160 BGN
- Демонтаж и монтаж на мивка (remove + install sink): 100–140 BGN
- Вана (bathtub): 200–250 BGN
- Душ-кабина (shower cabin): 200–260 BGN
- Душ-корито (shower tray): 120–160 BGN
- Биде (bidet): 100–140 BGN
- Тоалетна за вградено казанче (toilet for concealed cistern): 80–120 BGN
- Вградена конзола за казанче + тоалетна (wall-hung frame + toilet): 180–250 BGN
- Структура за вградено казанче (concealed cistern frame): 200–280 BGN
- Ремонт на вградено казанче (repair concealed cistern): 90–150 BGN
- Цялостен монтаж санитария в баня (complete bathroom fit-out): 220–380 BGN

### Faucets and Mixers
- Смесител в баня стоящ/стенен (bathroom mixer): 80–130 BGN
- Смесител в кухня (kitchen mixer): 80–100 BGN
- Смесител за вана (bath mixer): 100–120 BGN
- Вграден смесител (concealed mixer): 100–160 BGN
- Кран преди водомер (stopcock before meter): 80–110 BGN

### Water Heaters
- Бойлер (storage water heater): 80–130 BGN
- Проточен бойлер (instantaneous water heater): 70–100 BGN

### Appliances
- Пералня (washing machine): 70–100 BGN
- Съдомиялна (dishwasher): 70–100 BGN

### Siphons/Traps
- Сифон за вана (bath trap): 100–140 BGN
- Сифон за мивка (sink trap): 60–80 BGN
- Сифон-мелачка (garbage disposal trap): 100–150 BGN

### Drainage and Unblocking
- Отпушване на тоалетна (toilet unblocking): 70–120 BGN
- Отпушване на канал в баня/кухня (drain unblocking): 70–120 BGN
- Възвратна клапа ф110–ф160 (check valve 110–160mm): 150–250 BGN

### Water Meters
- Демонтаж и монтаж на водомер (remove + install meter): 50–60 BGN

### Price by Agreement
- Монтаж на структура (frame installation with detailed quote on site)
- Монтаж на моноблок (monoblock installation)
- Монтаж на душ комплекс (complex shower project)
- Цялостна баня с кърти-мажи (full bathroom including demolition)
- Смяна на кран (stopcock replacement)
- Смяна на мека връзка (flexible hose replacement)
- Подмяна на водомер (meter replacement — procedural)
- Подмяна на щрангове (riser pipe replacement)

## Service Area

Primary: Sofia (all districts)

Named neighborhoods with dedicated landing pages:
1. Панчарево (Pancharevo) — villas near Pancharevo Lake
2. Кокаляне (Kokaliane) — quiet village near Vitosha
3. Лозен (Lozen) — historic village, Lozen Monastery area
4. Герман (German) — residential, German Church area
5. Горубляне (Gorubliane) — panel blocks, SE Sofia
6. Бистрица (Bistritsa) — village at Vitosha foot
7. Бояна (Boyana) — prestigious, near UNESCO Boyana Church
8. Драгалевци (Dragalevtsi) — residential, ski lift area
9. Симеоново (Simeonovo) — new residential complexes
10. Младост (Mladost) — large residential district, 4 sub-districts
11. Дружба (Drujba) — near Sofia Airport
12. Кривина (Krivina) — village near Iskar River
13. Казичене (Kazichene) — mixed residential/industrial
14. Пасарел (Pasarel) — mountain village, Plana Mountain

## Website URL Architecture

- / — Homepage
- /uslugi/ — All services
- /uslugi/montaj-boyler/ — Boiler installation
- /uslugi/otpushvane-kanal/ — Drain unblocking
- /uslugi/montaj-bania/ — Bathroom installation
- /uslugi/smiana-vodomer/ — Water meter replacement
- /uslugi/montaj-smesitel/ — Faucet installation
- /uslugi/montaj-toaletna/ — Toilet installation
- /uslugi/montaj-vana-dush/ — Bathtub/shower installation
- /uslugi/montaj-mivka/ — Sink installation
- /uslugi/montaj-peralnq-sadomialna/ — Washing machine installation
- /uslugi/avariyni-vik-uslugi/ — Emergency plumbing
- /uslugi/podmiana-shrangove/ — Riser pipe replacement
- /ceni/ — Full price list
- /rayoni/ — Service areas overview
- /rayoni/sofia-{neighborhood}/ — 14 neighborhood pages
- /za-nas/ — About page (Teodor Petrov bio)
- /blog/ — Blog with VIK advice articles
- /vaprosi-i-otgovori/ — FAQ
- /otzivi/ — Customer reviews (4.9/5, 87 reviews)
- /kontakti/ — Contact page

## Statistical Claims

- "В над 80% от случаите аварийната намеса се извършва в рамките на 1 час" (In over 80% of cases, emergency response is within 1 hour)
- "В над 90% от случаите отпушването се решава при първото посещение" (In over 90% of drain unblocking cases, problem resolved on first visit)
- "3000+ доволни клиенти" (3000+ satisfied clients)
- Aggregate rating: 4.9/5 from 87 reviews
